scripts.build: pnpm --filter @docs-agent/control-plane build && pnpm --filter @docs-agent/control-plane db:migrate:deployment && eve build
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.test: tsx scripts/check-repository-materialization.ts && tsx scripts/check-repository-workflow.ts && tsx scripts/check-setup-state-db.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-profile.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-signal-queue.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-signal-lifecycle.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-signal-capture.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-signal-intake.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-impact-decision.ts && tsx scripts/check-workflow-model.ts && tsx scripts/check-slack-docs-signal.ts && tsx scripts/check-linear-docs-signal.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-signal-patch-handoff.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-signal-workflow-safety.ts && tsx scripts/check-workspace-memory.ts
